content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 Incentivized review WARN — Paywall offers Premium in exchange for a 5-star review (App/PaywallView.swift:11).
Pierre: Apple's guideline 2.3.9 prohibits offering rewards or incentives in exchange for app reviews or ratings, as this manipulates the App Store's rating system. The paywall string "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" is a clear quid-pro-quo tying a specific star rating to a reward, which will likely trigger a review rejection. Remove the incentive entirely; if you want feedback, use Apple's native `SKStoreReviewController` prompt without conditioning it on a reward or a specific rating.
